creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
In file included from glamor.c:36:
glamor_priv.h:43:23: error: epoxy/egl.h: No such file or directory

At this point in sparc64 support I don't think it's fair to ask port maintainers to investigate any more.  There is no enthusiasm for sparc64 in the FreeBSD developer community, and actually, some outright hostility.

I do not have the cycles to investigate/fix every failure.
